description: SlidesGPT is a service for generating PowerPoint presentations with AI from prompts or source material. It also offers agent-facing MCP access for creating and styling slide decks from compatible AI clients.
summary: SlidesGPT exposes a bearer-authenticated REST API at `api.slidesgpt.com` with published OpenAPI specs, plus a public remote MCP server at `https://mcp.slidesgpt.com/mcp` that requires no authentication.
